what: Read cached state from last sync
why: The cache represents the common ancestor for 3-way merge detection
output: Map of file paths to content hashes from the last known sync point

success_handling.criteria: Cache file exists and is parsed into a valid hash map

event.message: Cache state loaded from last sync

error_handling.criteria: Cache file does not exist or cannot be parsed as valid JSON
error_handling.action: Use empty cache as baseline (treat all files as new), warn user

event.message: Cache state unavailable, using empty baseline: {error}

decisions.outcome: Proceed to compare-three-way step with full 3-way data
Proceed to compare-three-way step with empty cache baseline
